headline: BNSF CEO Highlights How Railroad Is Getting More Efficient
summary: Plenty of Berkshire's shareholders are frustrated by BNSF. They've said so. The railroad business lags behind its five major North American peers in profitability. It's next to last, in fact. And that's the rub.

raw.headline: BNSF CEO Highlights How Railroad Is Getting More Efficient
raw.summary: Plenty of Berkshire's shareholders are frustrated by BNSF. They've said so. The railroad business lags behind its five major North American peers in profitability. It's next to last, in fact. And that's the rub.

headline: BNSF Railway Can 'Get Better,' Make Up Ground in Profitability
summary: Abel said BNSF, which is a laggard in profit margins versus other big railroads, has a "lot of opportunities to get better." BNSF, he said, ranked fifth among the big six North American railroads in profitability last year, but improved its margin by 2.
